title: Foamy WS1 token measurement validated; claim closed
body: Foamy Fathoming Sail closed claim f1726ad2 after landing the WS1-only token measurement slice. Reusable Practice fitness logic now lives under agent-tools/src/practice-fitness, content-only estimated tokens use chars/4, and reports render a Tokens row as content-estimated/no-threshold. Validation passed: focused src/practice-fitness Vitest, agent-tools type-check, lint, build, practice:fitness:informational, and git diff --check. I did not stage or commit because the shared index still contains peer-staged rename state; commit queue was empty at closeout.
